headline: Best animation picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
meta_description: Need better animation picks for tonight? Here are the titles actually worth starting first, without the usual generic streaming-list fluff.
subtitle: Featuring woody woodpecker goes to camp, ron’s gone wrong, and Pets United — plus more animation picks that deserve real attention.

hero_image.title: Best animation picks to stream when you want something better than another lazy scroll
hero_image.subtitle: Featuring woody woodpecker goes to camp, ron’s gone wrong, and Pets United — plus more animation picks that deserve real attention.

selected_titles.title: woody woodpecker goes to camp
selected_titles.description: Woody Woodpecker and his friends head to Camp Woo Hoo for summer fun, only to discover they must save the camp from closing while dealing with the mischievous antics of their bird friend.

selected_titles.title: ron’s gone wrong
selected_titles.description: A boy and his malfunctioning robot discover friendship beyond technology.

selected_titles.title: Pets United
selected_titles.description: An animated comedy about a group of pets who team up to save their city from robots.

selected_titles.title: Frozen
selected_titles.description: When the newly crowned Queen Elsa accidentally uses her power to turn things into ice to curse her home in infinite winter, her sister Anna teams up with a mountain man, his playful reindeer, and a snowman to change the weather condition.

cta.headline: Want a custom watchlist instead of generic streaming lists?
cta.body: Message MovieJam on WhatsApp and get 3 tailored picks based on your mood, genre, and how much brainpower you want to spend tonight.

internal_link_defaults.title: How to get custom movie recs on WhatsApp
Why endless scrolling ruins movie night

style_rules: Lead with a viral, opinionated hook in the first paragraph.
Keep the same vibe as the existing MyMovieJam blog: sharp, audience-first, clean, punchy, and honest.
Write like a real viewer, not a neutral encyclopedia.
Do not fake plot details, awards, or availability.
If the CSV data is thin, make the opinion narrower instead of inventing facts.
Use the MyMovieJam visual theme and CTA style already present on the site.
SEO first, but never at the cost of sounding robotic.
Use clear subheads, quick picks, FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.
notes_for_writer: Tell the truth if the list mixes films and series.
Write as a sharp viewer with taste, not a neutral database.
Pick clear winners, easy starters, and mood-based recommendations.
Use a clear WhatsApp CTA at the end.
